title: Tricycla peruviana
taxonomy: Tricycla peruviana is a species of air-breathing land snail, a terrestrial pulmonate gastropod mollusk in the family Otradovidae. It belongs to the genus Tricycla. The taxonomy of Tricycla peruviana places it within the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Stylommatophora. The species is specifically classified as Tricycla peruviana under the current classification systems. Further research may be needed to confirm its exact classification and taxonomic relationships.
